tray.unavailable: The notification area icon could not be started. OpenAver will remain open; exit from the main window instead.

close_dialog.content: Choose what OpenAver should do after the main window closes.
close_dialog.minimize: Minimize to the notification area (OpenAver keeps running in the background)
close_dialog.do_not_show_again: Do not show this prompt again
close_dialog.fallback_message: Choose Yes to exit OpenAver, No to minimize to the notification area, or Cancel to return.

placeholder.query: Search ID, actress or drop files...

hint.partial_search: Tip: Enter partial ID like IPZZ-03 to search 030–039; enter an actress name to find her works

empty.hint: Enter an ID to search, or add video files
empty.drag_hint: You can also drag and drop files or folders
empty.temp_scrape_hint: Temporary scrape is for external drives or one-off folders: add a folder, Batch Search, then Batch Organize to write NFO/covers.

error.hint: Please check the ID format or try again later
error.tag_api_failed: Failed to save tag, please try again later

actress.favorite_error: Failed to add, please try again
actress.favorite_timeout: Request timed out, please try again

local.has_local_count: {count} local versions available (click to open folder)

filelist.search_all_title: Search all files not yet searched
filelist.scrape_all_title: Organize all searched files (rename + folder + NFO)
filelist.connection_error: Connection error, please try again later
filelist.temp_scrape_hint: This is a temporary file list. It is not added to your library automatically; Showcase visibility depends on configured library paths.

toast.scrape_complete_dup: Batch organize complete: {success} succeeded, {failed} failed, {duplicate} duplicates
toast.no_search_results: No search results for this file
toast.no_valid_files: No valid video files (could not identify number)
toast.desktop_only: This feature requires the desktop app
toast.db_not_synced: Not linked — organized files won't appear in Showcase
toast.db_sync_failed: DB sync failed (file organized but not showing in Showcase)
toast.skipped_nfo_multipart: NFO skipped — this file is part 2+ of a multipart movie, managed by part 1's NFO

duplicate.title: Duplicate File
duplicate.body: The target file already exists. Continuing will overwrite it:
duplicate.explanation: This usually happens when the same title has multiple versions (CD1/CD2, 4K, UC).
duplicate.instruction: Go to Settings → Advanced Scrape Settings → Version Tags, add keywords and make sure the file naming format includes the {suffix} variable.

sources.uncensored_mode_off_hint: Manually re-enable any censored source to turn off uncensored mode (Off does not automatically re-enable censored sources)
sources.cap_exceeded_body: You have reached the limit of 10 enabled sources. Please disable one source first, or select a single source override in Advanced Search.
sources.warn_all_disabled: No sources are currently enabled — exact censored searches will return no results. Exceptions: actress / keyword searches still operate via JavBus always-on rules; FC2 / HEYZO / date-format IDs still auto-fallback via uncensored sources.
sources.counter_help: Auto-search uses up to 10 sources in the order you arranged them.
sources.mt_connected_tier_hint: After connecting, all providers stay in the list below by default (not in Active Row). Add them manually. After connecting, all providers are automatically probed — unreachable ones are grayed out with a common-cause label, and you can manually 'Retest' them.
sources.mt_promote_hint: Click to add to Active Row
sources.mt_disconnect_toast: Metatube disconnected. Please reconnect in Section 3 below.
sources.mt_enable_help: When enabled, expand the Metatube connection settings below to enter your self-hosted metatube server URL and access 30+ sources.
sources.mt_connect_network_error: Connection failed — check your network and try again
sources.mt_connect_success_toast: Connected — {count} providers loaded into the Provider List
sources.mt_probe_hint_title: Why are some sources grayed out?
sources.mt_probe_hint_reason1: Your metatube server has no Japan proxy configured or it is not working (region-blocked sources such as FANZA / MGS).
sources.mt_probe_hint_reason2: The source requires login or has anti-crawl measures (e.g. SOD — switching IPs does not help).
sources.mt_probe_hint_reason3: The source's metatube scraper has broken due to a site redesign (e.g. JAV321 / KIN8 — unrelated to your setup).
sources.mt_promote_unavailable_warning: This source is currently unreachable — it has been added to Active Row but may return no data
sources.mt_probe_failed_pill_hint: This source is currently unreachable — it may return no data after adding. Click 'Retest' to check again.
sources.dmm_proxy_required_hint: DMM requires a proxy to work — enable a proxy in Settings first

advanced_search.help: When enabled, long-press the search button on the Search page to pick a single source (including disabled ones) for a one-time override.
advanced_search.metatube_keyword_hint: Metatube sources do not support actress/keyword search — enter a full ID for best results.

thumbnail_cache.label: Cover Thumbnail Cache
thumbnail_cache.hint: Generates small local thumbnail caches for covers, greatly speeding up the cover wall and lightbox (especially when videos are on NAS / HDD). About 30 KB each.

confirm_modal.title: Enable Cover Thumbnail Cache
confirm_modal.body: Thumbnails will be generated for the current {count} videos, taking approximately {mb} MB of space. On a traditional hard drive (HDD) this will take about {min} minutes in the background; much faster on SSD. You can continue using the app normally while it runs — you'll be notified when done. (Saving current settings will start immediately upon confirmation.)

disable_modal.title: Disable Cover Thumbnail Cache
disable_modal.body: The generated cover thumbnails will be deleted (freeing approximately {mb} MB); no video data or original covers will be affected. Re-enabling will require regeneration in the background.

toast.desktop_only: This feature requires the desktop app

server_info.warning: Any device on the same network (Wi-Fi / LAN) can access this machine via the URL above. Only use on trusted networks. For remote access, configure a VPN (e.g. Tailscale).
server_info.no_lan_ip: Could not detect local LAN IP automatically. Check your system network settings for your IP and connect manually.
server_info.listener_down: LAN server is not running. Switch back to Local mode and re-enable Server mode.
server_info.toggle_failed: Failed to start LAN server. Please try again later.
server_info.autostart_failed: LAN server mode could not start automatically after restart. Go to Settings to re-enable it.
server_info.no_lan_ip_with_port: 無法自動取得本機區網 IP，請於系統網路設定查看本機 IP，再以「該 IP:{port}」連線。
server_info.disable_failed: 無法關閉 LAN 伺服器，請稍後再試。
server_info.remote_only: 伺服器模式只能在執行 OpenAver 的主機電腦上切換。

search.proxy_placeholder: http://user:pass@host:port — enter direct if you already have Japan IP
search.favorite_folder_hint: Load a commonly used folder with one click

translate.security_item1: API Key is stored in plain text in config.json
translate.security_item2: Do not share config.json with others
translate.openai_api_key_hint: Local LLMs can leave empty; cloud services require an API Key

scraper.suffix_keywords_hint: Filenames containing these keywords are kept as {suffix}; multiple keywords concatenate in list order
scraper.path_length_help_line1: Windows default path limit is 260 characters (Windows 10 1607+ / Windows 11).
scraper.path_length_help_line2: For longer filenames, open PowerShell as Administrator and run:
scraper.path_length_help_line3: Reboot required for changes to take effect.
scraper.path_length_help_line4: macOS / Linux have no such limit, but long filenames generated on macOS/Linux may still fail on Windows without LongPathsEnabled.
scraper.external_manager_off_hint: Writes a same-name cover and NFO (`{stem}.jpg`, `{stem}.nfo`) for OpenAver's own browser. The NFO is readable by any media server; the same-name cover is recognized directly only by Emby.
scraper.external_manager_jellyfin_hint: Also writes `{stem}-poster.jpg` / `{stem}-fanart.jpg` and adds media-server recognition fields to the NFO (number ID / sort title / country); cd1/cd2/part1 multipart auto-merges into one movie.
scraper.external_manager_emby_hint: Also writes `{stem}-poster.jpg` / `{stem}-fanart.jpg`, adds NFO recognition fields, and auto-merges multipart (cd1/cd2/part1); the filename VR projection tag is preserved on organize (for headset apps like DeoVR). Note: Emby reads the poster and NFO but does not recognize the `{stem}-fanart.jpg` backdrop name (fanart won't show in Emby; Jellyfin/Kodi are fine).
scraper.external_manager_kodi_hint: Also writes `{stem}-poster.jpg` / `{stem}-fanart.jpg` (Kodi recognizes various folder layouts) and adds NFO recognition fields; cd1/cd2/part1 multipart auto-merges.
scraper.download_sample_images_hint: Download stills to extrafanart/ during organize (requires Create Folder enabled)

system.reset_hint: Delete all custom settings and restore defaults

dirty_modal.title: Unsaved Changes
dirty_modal.body: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?

reset_modal.title: Reset all settings
reset_modal.body: Are you sure you want to reset all settings? This will delete all custom settings and cannot be undone.

status.openai_not_found: API endpoint not found, check Base URL
status.openai_rate_limited: Rate limit exceeded, try again later

toast.desktop_only: This feature requires the desktop app
toast.folder_already_added: This folder is already in the list
toast.generate_error: Generation failed. Check the log for details.
toast.nfo_update_error: NFO update failed. Check the log for details.
toast.jellyfin_update_error: Jellyfin image update failed. Check the log for details.

copy_fail_modal.title: Copy logs failed
copy_fail_modal.body: Clipboard write failed. Please select the text below manually and press Ctrl+C to copy:

folder.empty_line2: Click the button above or drag a folder here

stats.jellyfin_check_idle_label: Jellyfin cover status not checked yet
stats.jellyfin_help_line1: Jellyfin / Emby media servers require additional cover formats:
stats.jellyfin_help_line2: {stem}-poster.jpg — cropped from the right side of the cover (portrait poster)
stats.jellyfin_help_line3: {stem}-fanart.jpg — full-size copy of the cover (landscape background)
stats.jellyfin_help_line4: Click "Fix" to auto-generate from existing covers. Fully local, no network required.
stats.missing_enrich_disconnect: Connection lost, can resume next time
stats.missing_enrich_error: Enrich failed, please try again later
stats.missing_enrich_stream_error: Enrich error, can resume next time
stats.missing_enrich_interrupted: Enrich interrupted, can resume next time

alias.filter_hint: Filtering — {count} matches, press Enter or [Add] to create "{name}"

delete_group_modal.title: Delete Alias Group
delete_group_modal.body: Are you sure you want to delete the alias group for "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

dirty_modal.title: Unsaved Changes
dirty_modal.body: You have modified the folder list but haven't generated the page yet. What would you like to do?

clear_cache_modal.title: Clear Video Cache
clear_cache_modal.body_prefix: This will delete all cached video metadata (
clear_cache_modal.body_suffix: videos). You will need to re-scan next time. Are you sure?

tag_alias.new_group_placeholder: e.g. メイド / Maid / 女僕

delete_group_modal.title: Delete Tag Alias Group
delete_group_modal.body: Delete the entire tag alias group "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

ai_hint.tooltip: 💡 Let an AI agent organize via /api/capabilities for faster results

leave_warning.generating: Generation is in progress — leaving will abort it!
leave_warning.image_check: Image check is in progress — leaving will interrupt it!

duplicates.description: Check scanned library entries for numbers that point to multiple videos. CD1/CD2 and Part1/Part2 multipart sets are hidden by default.
duplicates.reason_multiple_unlabeled: Multiple files share the same number without part labels
duplicates.reason_complementary_multipart: Files form a complementary multipart set
duplicates.reason_mixed: Unlabeled and multipart files share the same number
duplicates.delete_multipart_disabled: Valid multipart videos are protected by default
duplicates.delete_failed: Failed to move to Recycle Bin
duplicates.delete_modal_body: The following files will be moved to the system Recycle Bin, not permanently deleted.
duplicates.delete_recycle_hint: If this was a mistake, restore the files from the Windows Recycle Bin.
duplicates.delete_success_with_empty_folders: Moved to Recycle Bin and cleaned {count} empty folders
duplicates.delete_success_empty_folder_warning: Video was moved to Recycle Bin, but empty-folder cleanup failed. You can check again later.

empty_folders.description: Find folders under the current library directories that contain nothing. #待整理, #待人工整理, .openaver-migration, and 未整理 are skipped.
empty_folders.protected_note: Protected folders are not scanned or cleaned.
empty_folders.modal_body: The following empty folders will be moved to the Windows Recycle Bin, not permanently deleted.
empty_folders.recycle_hint: If this was a mistake, restore them from the Windows Recycle Bin. Library roots and protected folders are never deleted.

title_placeholders.description: Find videos with untrusted placeholder titles and move the video plus same-stem metadata files to #待整理. This does not re-scrape, translate, or rename titles.
title_placeholders.empty: No placeholder or untrusted titles were found.
title_placeholders.modal_body: The following videos will be moved to #待整理 from the fixed preview list, up to 20 per batch.
title_placeholders.manual_hint: This only moves files. It will not re-scrape them; handle them later in the manual review area.
title_placeholders.move_success: Moved {moved} videos, {remaining} remaining; cleaned {folders} empty folders

organize.subtitle: Drop new videos into #待整理 under each library root, then scan, identify, preview, and organize them in a JavSP-style flow.
organize.no_roots: No library directory is configured yet. Add gallery.directories in Settings first.
organize.empty_entries: Scan #待整理 first. Files without a detected ID stay visible so you can enter an ID manually and search again.
organize.flow_hint: Filter the list first, then select the current filtered results. Unselected paths are skipped completely.
organize.empty_filtered: No entries match the current filters
organize.apply_modal_body: Only the selected movable videos in this fixed preview will be organized. Existing files will not be overwritten.
organize.apply_modal_hint: Unselected, not found, failed, or conflicted files remain in #待整理.
organize.desktop_only: Opening local folders is only available in the desktop app
organize.toast_selected_no_found: No selected items are ready to organize after re-search
organize.reason_number_not_found: Could not detect an ID from the filename
organize.reason_source_not_in_inbox: Source file is not inside #待整理
organize.toast_search_restored: Restored the last background search result
organize.toast_job_lost: Background search job no longer exists; scan again
organize.progress_canceling: Canceling; remaining entries will stop after the current search finishes
organize.toast_offline_plan_done: Offline preview ready: {planned} movable, {rescrape} need re-search, {conflict} conflicts
organize.toast_offline_no_ready: No entries are ready for offline organization. Use re-search selected instead.
organize.reason_offline_nfo_missing: Same-name NFO is missing; re-search needed
organize.reason_offline_nfo_invalid: NFO could not be parsed; re-search needed

media_merge.subtitle: Use bundled or system FFmpeg to merge CD1/CD2, part1/part2, and similar split videos into one file.
media_merge.paths_placeholder: One video path per line, or use Select Videos to add CD1/CD2 files.
media_merge.ffmpeg_hint: Place ffmpeg.exe under tools/ffmpeg/bin, or install FFmpeg on PATH and restart OpenAver.
media_merge.extension_warning: The parts use different extensions; FFmpeg may not be able to losslessly merge them.
media_merge.overwrite: Allow overwriting an existing output file
media_merge.cleanup_sources: After verification, move source parts and old scrape files to Recycle Bin
media_merge.cleanup_unsupported: Moving files to the Windows Recycle Bin is not available in this environment.
media_merge.stage_cleaning: Moving source parts and old scrape files to Recycle Bin
media_merge.cleanup_warning_cleanup_failed: The video was merged and verified, but moving source parts or old scrape files to Recycle Bin failed. Source files were kept.
media_merge.cleanup_warning_recycle_bin_unavailable: The video was merged and verified, but this environment cannot move files to Recycle Bin. Source parts and old scrape files were kept.
media_merge.cleanup_warning_unknown: The video was merged, but cleanup reported a warning. Please check the source parts and old scrape files.
media_merge.desktop_select_only: File picking is available in the desktop app; you can also paste paths manually.
media_merge.desktop_open_only: Opening local folders requires the desktop app
media_merge.toast_drop_folder_expand: Folder drop received. Videos inside the folder will be added automatically when available.

rescrape.not_found: Not found — try a different ID or source.
rescrape.fail: Re-scrape failed, please try again later.
rescrape.jl_desktop_only: Available in standalone desktop app only
rescrape.jl_cf_solving: Cloudflare check in progress — will resume automatically once passed

lightbox.tag_api_failed: Failed to save tag, please try again

delete_modal.title: Remove This Video from Collection
delete_modal.body: Only the database record for "{number}" will be removed. The video file will remain on disk and will not be deleted; if the file is still in a scanned folder, it will be added back on the next scan.

folder_delete_modal.title: Move Entire Video Folder to Recycle Bin
folder_delete_modal.body: The folder containing "{number}" will be moved to the Windows Recycle Bin. DB records are removed only after that succeeds. Video, NFO, images, and subtitles go together.
folder_delete_modal.summary: {files} files will be moved; {db} database rows will be removed after success.

video.folder_delete_success: Video folder moved to Recycle Bin
video.folder_delete_failed: Failed to delete folder. Check folder contents or logs.

actress.addTimeout: Scrape timed out, please try again

remove_modal.title: Remove from favorites
remove_modal.body: Remove "{name}" from your favorites? This cannot be undone.

actress.emptyHint: Click + in the top right to add one

picker.empty_hint: More saved videos = more local options. You can also replace the image file directly.
picker.replaced: Photo replaced. You can change it anytime.

samples.fetch_failed: Failed to fetch stills, please try again
samples.multi_video_error: This folder contains other videos. Fetching stills here may affect them. Please move the video to its own folder first.

hero.subtitle: JAV Metadata Management Tool
hero.privacy: 🔒 Local app only — no user data collected
hero.ai_instruction: Paste to AI agent to control OpenAver
hero.ai_tools: Paste to any AI agent to operate OpenAver — Claude Code · Cursor · Codex etc.

workflow.title: First time? Follow these 3 steps
workflow.subtitle: From adding your folder to filling metadata — three steps to get started
workflow.step1_desc: Track your AV video folder in Scanner
workflow.step2_desc: Scan and build a browsable collection page in one click
workflow.step3_desc: Missing covers or metadata? Fetch them from the web in one click
workflow.next_steps_similar: Lightbox wand button: fuzzy-explore similar videos
workflow.next_steps_favorite: Add your favorite actresses to your collection
workflow.next_steps_tag_alias: Click any tag chip to expand synonyms (auto cross-language: Chinese, Japanese, English)

power_user.title: Want more control?
power_user.intro: Like to control every detail yourself? OpenAver gives you the full set of advanced entry points — scrape titles one by one with precision, define custom naming rules, manage cross-language aliases. See the Search, Settings, and Tag Alias sections below.

tag_alias.title: Tag Alias Management
tag_alias.intro: Manage Chinese/Japanese/English synonyms in one place so the search box, chip filters, and fuzzy exploration all speak the same language.
tag_alias.scanner_chipwall: The chip wall lists all tag alias groups. Click "+" to add an alias; the primary name is shown in pink, aliases in grey.
tag_alias.scanner_ai_hint: Click "?" to open the AI suggestion panel: describe your tag needs to the AI and it returns suggested alias groups for direct import.
tag_alias.showcase_expand: When you type in the search box or click a chip, synonyms are automatically expanded for filtering — consistent with actress alias behavior.
tag_alias.showcase_click: Click any tag chip → filter all videos sharing any synonym tag, no need to know the exact Japanese spelling.
tag_alias.tip_ranker: After building aliases, the constellation mode (fuzzy exploration) picks them up immediately — videos with synonym tags count toward the similarity score.

search.title: Search
search.method_series: Series Search: e.g. SONE, finds latest in series
search.method_actress: Actress Name: e.g. Kaho Imai, finds her works
search.drag_auto: Drag video files into the window to auto-extract ID and search
search.drag_batch: Supports batch processing of multiple files (up to 20 at once)
search.drag_generate: After a successful search, click 'Organize' to rename files, download covers, create folders and write NFO
search.grid_switch: After searching, switch to cover wall view; click a cover to open Lightbox
search.grid_lightbox: Lightbox: Full-screen cover view; use ← → to navigate, Esc to close
search.grid_detail: Lightbox shows director, duration, series, label and more (only when data is available)
search.grid_gallery: Click the 'Stills' button to browse sample images; supports keyboard <kbd class="kbd kbd-sm">←</kbd> <kbd class="kbd kbd-sm">→</kbd> and touch swipe
search.badge_keywords: When a filename contains keywords like -4k or -uc, a colored badge appears on the result card
search.picker_longpress: ① Long-press the search button to pick a single source for that search (Beta — enable in Settings › Advanced)
search.picker_panel_switch: ② Long-press 🔄 in the result panel to switch source
search.picker_showcase_enrich: ③④ In Showcase cover wall or lightbox, long-press the enrich button (🔍) → re-scrape the current title with a chosen source.
search.picker_lightbox_gear: ⑤ In Showcase lightbox, click ⚙ next to the ID → advanced re-scrape the current title (single click, no long-press).

batch.title: Batch File Search
batch.add_folder: Drop Folder: Automatically scans video files in the folder
batch.add_filter: Auto Filter: Excludes non-video files and files below the size threshold
batch.add_batch: Batch Search: 20 files per batch, 2 concurrent requests
batch.fav_settings: Set your frequently used folder path on the Settings page; choose from Scanner-tracked folders via dropdown with inline link status (✓ Linked to Scanner / ⚠ Not tracked)
batch.fav_load: Click the '⭐ Favorites' button to load it instantly
batch.fav_auto: Automatically begins searching the first 20 files
batch.fav_nfo_skip: If a same-name .nfo already exists, the file is treated as organized and the scraper is skipped
batch.pause_pause: Click the 'Pause' button during batch search
batch.pause_resume: Click 'Resume' to continue from where it paused
batch.generate_all: After batch search completes, organize all successful results at once (rename, create folders, download covers, write NFO)
batch.badge_suffix: Tags like -cd1 or -4k in filenames are automatically preserved as {suffix}

format.title: Format Variables Reference
format.fallback_folder_rule: Folder levels use fallback values (e.g. 'Unknown Actress') to avoid empty paths
format.fallback_filename_rule: Filename does not use fallback; variables are omitted when empty

actress.title: Actress Features
actress.search_hero: When searching a favorited actress name, a profile card (photo, age, height, measurements) appears above the search box
actress.search_favorite: Tap ♡ on any result card to add to favorites; favorited actresses are looked up locally without a network request
actress.search_grid: Actress search results with 10+ works automatically switch to cover-wall mode with Lightbox navigation
actress.showcase_toggle: Toolbar toggle switches between film mode and actress mode (Film | Person icon)
actress.showcase_grid: Actress favorites grid with sorting by name, age, cup size, height, or date added
actress.showcase_lightbox: Lightbox supports changing photo or removing from favorites
actress.manage_add: Add favorites from Search or Showcase; profile photo is downloaded locally automatically
actress.manage_alias: Alias management: add and edit actress aliases on the Scanner page; all known aliases are expanded automatically during search
actress.manage_enrich: Click 🔄 in lightbox to replace actress photo with cloud or local-video-cover candidates
actress.manage_photo_path: Favorited actress photos are stored in the output/Gfriends/ directory; when changing a profile photo, all alias names are automatically expanded for local candidate lookup

scanner.title: Video List Generator (Scanner)
scanner.feat_scan: Scans local video folders and generates a beautiful HTML showcase page
scanner.feat_nfo: Automatically reads NFO files and displays metadata
scanner.feat_nfo_fill: Supports 'NFO Fill': automatically searches for missing NFO files
scanner.feat_terminal: Built-in Mini Terminal shows real-time processing progress
scanner.output_html: index.html: A static page that can be opened in any browser
scanner.output_copy: Auto Copy: Cover images and NFO files are copied to the output directory
scanner.output_darkmode: Dark Mode: Automatically follows the Web App theme setting
scanner.subtitle_detect: When organizing videos, automatically detects subtitle files with the same name in the same directory (.srt, .ass, .ssa)
scanner.subtitle_move: After a video is moved successfully, subtitles are moved with it, preserving language suffixes (e.g. .cht.srt)
scanner.subtitle_nfo: When subtitles are detected, NFO is automatically tagged with 'Chinese Subtitles'
scanner.jellyfin_enable: Once enabled on the Settings page, scanning automatically generates -poster.jpg + -fanart.jpg
scanner.jellyfin_showcase: After scanning, browse results on the /showcase page
scanner.h6_multiversion: Multi-version manual merge (native Emby / Jellyfin feature)
scanner.multiversion_intro: Merging multiple versions of the same title (censored / uncensored leak / subtitled) into one entry with a version dropdown in Emby or Jellyfin is a feature both support natively (the same {folder name} - {label} rule), not exclusive to either. Just arrange the files manually as below:
scanner.multiversion_rule1: Each version's filename must start with the folder name followed by " - label" (space, hyphen, space)
scanner.multiversion_rule2: Multi-version and cd1/cd2 multipart cannot be used together on the same title (media server official limitation)

showcase.title: Video Browser (Showcase)
showcase.intro: After Scanner finishes, browse your video library at the /showcase page.
showcase.mode_grid: Grid Mode: Cover wall view, click to open Lightbox
showcase.mode_list: List Mode: Compact list, ideal for quick browsing
showcase.mode_table: Table Mode: Full metadata in a table layout
showcase.sort_sort: Sort: Date / ID / Title / Actress / Maker / Size / Modified / Random
showcase.sort_search: Search: Filter by ID, actress, title and more
showcase.other_lightbox: Lightbox full-screen cover view (<kbd class="kbd kbd-sm">←</kbd> <kbd class="kbd kbd-sm">→</kbd> to navigate)
showcase.other_lightbox_detail: Lightbox shows director, duration, series, label and more
showcase.other_gallery: Lightbox can open sample image gallery (click 'Stills' button)
showcase.other_per_page: Items per page can be adjusted on the Settings page

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.search_hint: All shortcuts are disabled when the search box is focused.

scraper.title: Scraper Sources
scraper.censored_dmm: DMM: Requires a Japanese IP proxy (Settings page → Proxy field)
scraper.default_source_set: Drag to reorder sources in the 'Sources' tab — the system uses them in order
scraper.default_source_effect: Disable a source's toggle to temporarily exclude it without deleting its settings
scraper.fuzzy_always_on: Fuzzy search exception: When searching by actress name or keyword, sources follow the ranked order even if disabled in Sources — disabled status only applies to exact ID searches.
scraper.dmm_fuzzy_trigger: Entering a Japanese actress or maker name in the search box also triggers DMM fuzzy search
scraper.dmm_fuzzy_prereq: Prerequisite: DMM must be enabled (requires Proxy or direct mode)
scraper.proxy_direct_vpn: If you are already connected to a Japan VPN or are located in Japan, no extra Proxy setup is needed
scraper.proxy_direct_how: Simply enter direct in the Proxy field on the Settings page to enable DMM directly
scraper.toggle_uncensored: Enable the 'Uncensored Mode' toggle on the Settings page to prioritize uncensored sources

metatube.title: Metatube Tutorial
metatube.what_desc: metatube is a self-hosted HTTP server that unlocks 30+ upstream providers in one connection (ideal for power users / Docker environments).
metatube.enable_gate: Settings › 'Search & Scrape' — enable the Metatube gate toggle → connection section expands
metatube.enable_url: Enter Server URL (e.g. http://your-metatube:8080) + optional Bearer token → click [Connect]
metatube.sources_promote: 30+ providers land in the Parts Bin — manually promote the ones you want into Active Row (cap: 10)
metatube.sources_offline: Unreachable sources are automatically grayed out — click [Retest] to recheck connectivity
metatube.lan_ssrf: Servers hosted on LAN require an opt-in checkbox in Settings (SSRF safety reminder)
metatube.limits_picker: Metatube sources in the picker do not support actress / keyword search — enter a full ID for best results
metatube.db_hint: Searching multiple metatube sources in parallel can be slow — consider switching your metatube server to PostgreSQL instead of the default SQLite (this is a metatube server setting, not an OpenAver setting).
metatube.crossref_picker: Use the Advanced Search picker to select a single metatube source → see the 'Search' card

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.crash_cause: Cause: Windows security has blocked files downloaded from the internet.
troubleshooting.display_cause: Cause: Missing WebView2 Runtime (common on Windows 10 or VMs).
troubleshooting.display_fix: Fix: Download and install Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime.
troubleshooting.report_debug_3: Report the log file and error message to GitHub Issues
troubleshooting.dmm_proxy: DMM requires a Japanese IP; enter a Japanese proxy in the Settings page → Proxy field
troubleshooting.dmm_direct: If you are already on a VPN or Japan network, you can also enter direct in the Proxy field to enable it without a proxy address.
troubleshooting.translate_ollama: Ollama: Confirm the Ollama application is running (Windows requires manual launch)
troubleshooting.translate_gemini: Gemini: Confirm the API Key is correctly set on the Settings page
troubleshooting.translate_openai: OpenAI Compatible: Check that the Base URL and model name are correct

js.check_update_failed: Check failed, please try again later
js.check_update_network_error: Network error, please try again later

similar.title: Similar Video Discovery (Rule-based)
similar.intro: Click the wand button in Lightbox → 12 discovery stars orbit the main cover; stars are ranked by rule-based tag similarity (IDF-weighted + series / maker / year / cast signals). No model downloads required — works out of the box.
similar.what_principle: Primary signal uses IDF-weighted Jaccard — rare tag matches score higher; combined with series / maker / year / cast multi-signal scoring.
similar.what_crop: Exact series match gets a bonus, bringing same-series videos to the top.
similar.what_diversity: MMR diversity rerank (λ=0.7) ensures the final 12 results balance similarity and variety.
similar.use_lightbox: Open Lightbox in Showcase video mode → click the wand button in the top-left → enter constellation mode
similar.use_constellation: 12 stars orbit the central main cover; click any star to "dive in" and make it the new main — explore endlessly
similar.use_mobile: On mobile (< 768px) falls back to a grid of the top 4 results below the main cover, without animation
similar.beta_uncensored: For uncensored / FC2 / old compilation covers with non-standard layouts, videos without metadata fall into Tier 3/4 (random fill) with lower relevance
similar.beta_compilation: More complete tags (series / maker / cast) means better accuracy; videos with few tags should have their NFO filled in first
similar.manage_enable: No configuration needed — works out of the box
similar.manage_scanner: After adding videos, the index updates automatically when Scanner generates the webpage — no manual steps needed

server_mode.title: 伺服器模式 — 讓手機/平板連進來
server_mode.what_single: 預設「單機」模式：只有這台電腦能用。
server_mode.what_server: 切到「伺服器」模式：同一個 Wi-Fi / 區網內的手機、平板、別台電腦，可以用瀏覽器打開畫面上顯示的網址，瀏覽封面牆、線上看片、查番號。
server_mode.what_where: 切換位置在「設定」頁右上角的「單機 ｜ 伺服器」膠囊。
server_mode.how_url: 切到「伺服器」後，下方會出現一條連線網址（例如 http://192.168.1.50:50123）。
server_mode.how_copy: 點「複製」把網址傳到手機，或用瀏覽器內建「傳送到其他裝置」，在手機瀏覽器打開即可。
server_mode.how_off: 切回「單機」就完全關閉對外，區網裝置立刻連不到。
server_mode.security_lan: 僅限信任的 Wi-Fi / 區網使用（本程式不設帳號密碼，LAN-only）。
server_mode.security_vpn: 需要外網存取請自行配置 VPN（如 Tailscale）；本程式不開放外網。
server_mode.h6_firewall: 第一次開啟會跳防火牆，請按「允許」
server_mode.firewall_allow: 第一次切到「伺服器」時，Windows（或 macOS）會跳出防火牆詢問是否允許網路存取 → 請按「允許 / Allow」。按一次就好，系統會記住。
server_mode.firewall_why: 這是因為要讓別台裝置連進來，作業系統需要你授權（與 Plex 等區網工具相同）。單機模式不會跳。
server_mode.h6_recover: 不小心按了「取消 / 拒絕」怎麼救回
server_mode.recover_win_1: 按 Win + R，輸入 wf.msc 後 Enter，開啟「Windows Defender 防火牆 進階安全性」。
server_mode.recover_win_3: 找「程式」是 python.exe（或名稱 Python / OpenAver）、「動作」為「封鎖 (Block)」的規則，通常有兩條（公用＋私人）。
server_mode.recover_win_4: 右鍵刪除這幾條，重開 OpenAver，再切到「伺服器」並按「允許」。
server_mode.recover_mac: macOS 救回：系統設定 → 網路 → 防火牆 → 選項，找到本程式改成「允許傳入連線」。

tutorial.step1_content:
Add the folder path where your AV videos are stored
OpenAver will scan all videos and build a browsable page
tutorial.step2_content:
Click this button to scan and build your private collection page
Takes just a few seconds
tutorial.step3_content:
After scanning, return to the Scanner page
The NFO fill button appears automatically — fetch missing covers or metadata from the web in one click
tutorial.step4_content:
Open Showcase when done
The lightbox has a wand button to fuzzy-explore similar videos
tutorial.step5_content:
Want precise control over each title's metadata?
Search lets you handle them one by one manually
tutorial.step6_content:
Naming format, AI translation, and visual strategy are all in Settings
Come back when you're ready to dig deeper
tutorial.step7_content:
Come back any time to replay this
The Help page also has full feature docs and AI agent commands
